nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned value and change fields

props.name: minimumDurationDays
props.type: positive safe integer using inclusive calendar days

props.name: maximumDurationDays
props.type: positive safe integer using inclusive calendar days

compositionPolicy.range: Two named native date controls retain bounds, required validation, reset, and canonical repeated form data.
compositionPolicy.presets: Presets are an independent opt-in surface and event source.
compositionPolicy.duration: Duration is calculated and rendered only when showDurationSummary is true and the range is complete and ordered.
compositionPolicy.durationBounds: Optional inclusive minimum and maximum duration constraints derive native end bounds, custom validity, recoverable error text, and an issue callback; with both omitted those outputs and events are absent.
